introSection: French Revolution is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Lotte World in amsil-Dong, Songpa-Gu, Seoul, South Korea.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
French Revolution opened with the park in 1989.

In November 2016, virtual reality was added to the French Revolution. The ride would be renamed French Revolution2 VR the year after.

Virtual reality was removed on an unknown date.

fullText:
French Revolution is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Lotte World in amsil-Dong, Songpa-Gu, Seoul, South Korea.

French Revolution opened with the park in 1989.

In November 2016, virtual reality was added to the French Revolution. The ride would be renamed French Revolution2 VR the year after.

Virtual reality was removed on an unknown date.
